metadata.title: PulseTrack — Analytics SaaS | Drive your growth
metadata.description: PulseTrack unifies your product metrics, team performance and revenue in real time. Free 14-day trial, no credit card required.
metadata.ogDescription: The analytics platform that makes you want to act. Real-time metrics, custom dashboards, intelligent alerts.

hero.subtitle: PulseTrack unifies your product metrics, team performance and revenue in real time — one dashboard to drive your SaaS toward growth.

features.title: Everything your team needs
features.subtitle: A unified platform to measure, analyze and optimize every aspect of your growth.
features.f1Desc: Visualize your data as it happens. No more waiting — immediate decisions based on facts.
features.f2Desc: Capture every user interaction with surgical precision. Segment and analyze without any limit.
features.f3Desc: Build tailored dashboards in minutes and share them with your entire team instantly.
features.f4Desc: Get instantly notified of anomalies and critical opportunities for your business.
features.f5Desc: Send weekly and monthly reports automatically. Save hours every single week.
features.f6Desc: Connect PulseTrack to your existing tools. Slack, HubSpot, Salesforce and 50+ native integrations.

dashboard.title: Your metrics, at a glance
dashboard.subtitle: A dashboard built for efficiency. Find everything that really matters, without unnecessary noise.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent, no surprises
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that matches your growth stage. Switch plans at any time.
pricing.plan1Desc: For teams just starting their data journey.
pricing.plan2Desc: For growing teams who want to go further.
pricing.plan3Desc: For large organizations with specific needs and unlimited volume.

testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.subtitle: Teams of all sizes trust PulseTrack to drive their growth.
testimonials.t1Quote: PulseTrack has transformed how we make decisions. Our meetings are now data-driven, not opinion-driven. The difference is spectacular.
testimonials.t2Quote: I tried 5 analytics tools before PulseTrack. It's the only one that makes me actually want to look at dashboards every morning. The UX is flawless.
testimonials.t3Quote: Visible ROI in 2 weeks. Onboarding is lightning fast and support responds in minutes. A real game changer for our growth team.

cta.title: Ready to transform your analytics?
cta.subtitle: Join 10,000+ teams driving their growth with PulseTrack. 14-day free trial, no credit card required.

footer.tagline: The analytics platform that makes you want to act.

liveStats.ls1Sub: processed this month in real time

integrations.title: Connected to your entire stack
integrations.subtitle: PulseTrack integrates natively with your existing tools. No complex setup — plug in and start measuring in minutes.
